title: Infosys and Mastercard Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Mastercard to offer financial institutions enhanced access to Mastercard Move, Mastercard's portfolio of money movement capabilities. The solution will integrate with Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys, to help financial institutions access Mastercard Move's cross-border capabilities in a fraction of typical implementation time and with reduced integration resourcing. The collaboration targets fast, secure cross-border payments and is positioned to support banks and financial institutions in improving digital payment experiences.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Mastercard to offer financial institutions enhanced access to Mastercard Move.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: The solution will integrate with Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: The integration is intended to create an efficient pathway for financial institutions to access Mastercard Move's cross-border capabilities in a fraction of the typical implementation time and without the intensive resourcing traditionally needed for integration projects.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: Mastercard Move provides fast, secure money transfer solutions domestically and internationally, reaching more than 200 countries and 150+ currencies, with access to more than 95 percent of the world's banked population.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: Infosys described the collaboration as enabling near real-time, cross-border payments designed to significantly improve the financial experiences of everyday customers.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments
